evidence_label: branch-review minimum packet refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia) AND (gene therapy OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR monitoring OR iron overload OR transfusion burden) AND (2025:2026[dp])

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_diagnosis
guideline_sources.role: diagnosis and genotype/phenotype context before branch interpretation

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_transfusion
guideline_sources.role: transfusion interval, hemoglobin targets, blood-bank, and reaction context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_iron_overload
guideline_sources.role: ferritin, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelation, and organ-risk context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_monitoring
guideline_sources.role: screening and monitoring domains needed before branch review

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct_and_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: separates allogeneic HCT and gene-cell routes as different branch questions

pubmed_records.title: Best practices in gene therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Exa-cel in children with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia or sickle cell disease.
Experience with stem cell collection for children with transfusion-dependent thalassemia undergoing gene therapy.
Correction of ineffective erythropoiesis and normalization of iron homeostasis after exagamglogene autotemcel in TDT.
Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Clinical burden and healthcare resource utilization after allogeneic HCT for sickle cell disease or beta-thalassemia.
Cost-effectiveness of exagamglogene autotemcel gene-edited therapy in patients with TDT in the United States.

decision_use: These sources support a minimum private packet checklist before asking a doctor to answer branch scope. They do not support patient-specific eligibility, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion, chelation, or sample-routing decisions.
